Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Baking baguettes is more of a ... réponse au stress for me. I insist that this is not all I ever do !

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: And I am not usually so extra about it, either.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: His fingers play along the edges of the table, but he makes no attempt to reach for his handiwork: neither the baguettes nor the condiment.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: The two of you look onto the replica Eiffel Tower, if that's what you could call this cobbled structure, and sit in silence. Whether you're comfortable like this or not, he certainly isn't.

Line.Text: After a prolonged amount of fidgeting, he clears his throat.
